messages:
{"parts":[{"content":"Go ahead + incorporate the last comments I provided (some might be missing an image for context so do your best to infer). Summarize all the changes you have planned and preview them before solving

1\. visual layout + factual drift

2\. larger cards with less whitespace

3\. only in headers/subheaders

ok now a few more tactical tweaks:

 Ok new plan for this section, always following the following format and complete in 3 lines or less: "This {3-4 word description of professional} is a {quality of fit} fit based on my screens because..." and in what remains, it should essentially articulate in under 2 lines why this person stands out as someone ultimately worth talking (given your understanding of the employers' top priorities as defined in the hiring pov but without rearticulating said priorities here)

 - adjust spacing so this fomatting isn't fucked up

 - these sub-descriptions e.g "Candidate demonstrates proven....engineer responsibilties" are crap. They should be articulations of why you believe in the {confidence in priority-fit aligment} that you defined e.g. strong fit in this case

 - i think you'll be better by setting these up like you did the section below instead of doing 3 on one row and 1 on the second","timestamp":"2026-02-08T00:42:30.865541Z","part_kind":"user-prompt"}],"timestamp":null,"instructions":"","kind":"request","run_id":null,"metadata":null}
